history.description: Actor John Hurt, the gravelly voiced British actor who garnered Oscar nominations for his roles in “Midnight Express” and “The Elephant Man,” has died at the age of 77, publicist Charles Mc Donald said Friday. Actor John Hurt attends the “Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Spy” premiere on Sept. 5, 2011, in V
